text:
Summary: Data scientist with 5 years of experience building ML systems for marketing attribution and churn prediction. Skilled in Python, scikit-learn, and SQL. 
Experience:
- Built end-to-end churn prediction pipeline (AUC 0.86) using gradient boosting; reduced churn by 12%.
- Deployed marketing mix model that improved ROAS by 18%.
Projects:
- NLP intent classifier using logistic regression on TF-IDF features.
Skills: Python, Pandas, scikit-learn, SQL, Airflow, Docker, AWS
Education: BSc Computer Science

Summary: Backend engineer specializing in microservices and cloud infrastructure. 
Experience:
- Designed REST APIs and event-driven services with Kafka.
- Optimized PostgreSQL queries reducing latency by 40%.
Projects:
- Containerized applications with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes.
Skills: Go, Python, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform
Education: BEng Software Engineering

Summary: Machine learning engineer focusing on computer vision and MLOps.
Experience:
- Trained CNNs for defect detection, achieving 95% recall.
- Built CI/CD for ML models with MLflow and Docker.
Projects:
- Image segmentation pipeline with U-Net.
Skills: Python, PyTorch, OpenCV, MLflow, Docker, GCP
Education: MSc Data Science
